description: Gout-relevant target panel for TCM compound triage. ChEMBL target IDs verified via target_search MCP queries 2026-05-06.

targets.name: URAT1 (SLC22A12)
targets.function: Apical urate reabsorber in kidney proximal tubule. Inhibition reduces serum urate (uricosuric). Drug target for benzbromarone, lesinurad, dotinurad.

targets.name: ABCG2
targets.function: Apical urate efflux transporter; gut + kidney. Accounts for ~33% gut urate secretion. Q141K LoF variant strongly associated with hyperuricemia.
targets.gout_relevance: INHIBITION RAISES SERUM URATE — bad for gout if compound inhibits in gut. Activation would be therapeutic.

targets.name: GLUT9 (SLC2A9)
targets.function: Basolateral urate exporter in kidney; also intestinal. Inhibition reduces serum urate.
targets.gout_relevance: potential uricosuric target; few selective inhibitors known

targets.name: Xanthine dehydrogenase/oxidase
targets.function: Catalyzes hypoxanthine→xanthine→urate. Inhibition lowers serum urate (urate-production class).
targets.gout_relevance: primary therapeutic target — allopurinol, febuxostat class

targets.name: NLRP3
targets.function: Inflammasome; activated by MSU crystals → IL-1β release → gout flare inflammation.
targets.gout_relevance: anti-inflammatory target for flare prevention; not urate-lowering

targets.name: Soluble epoxide hydrolase (sEH)
targets.function: Hydrolyzes anti-inflammatory epoxyeicosatrienoic acids (EETs) to less-active diols. Inhibition raises EETs → anti-inflammatory.

targets.name: OAT1 (SLC22A6)
targets.function: Basolateral organic anion transporter in kidney proximal tubule; uptakes urate from blood for secretion.
targets.gout_relevance: OAT1 upregulation increases urate clearance (Smilax glabra mechanism per PMID 30851369)

targets.name: OAT3 (SLC22A8)
targets.function: Basolateral organic anion transporter in kidney; co-localized with OAT1; secretes urate.
targets.gout_relevance: OAT3 modulators may alter urate clearance
